work_experience.job_title: Product Manager - B2C products and Internal Tools
work_experience.key: Carro-Product Manager - B2C products and Internal Tools
achievement: Defined rollout phases and delivery strategy across six regional markets, balancing stakeholder demands with scope and delivery constraints.
Managed sprint planning, scope trade-offs, and effort estimation with tech leads to deliver web, mobile, and internal products under aggressive timelines and competing priorities.
Tracked RAID items in Jira and led weekly reviews to resolve blockers and compliance risks, escalating key issues to C-level stakeholders during weekly leadership meetings.
Led UAT with QA and ops using predefined acceptance criteria, tracked test outcomes and readiness in Jira, and drove go/no-go decisions.
Managed cross-functional release communications and stakeholder updates to ensure delivery alignment and operational readiness.
Launched Carro Taiwan MVP by managing rollout, customizing SOPs for compliance, and driving adoption, resulting in on-time delivery and 15% conversion from enquiries.

work_experience.key: Capital Diamond Star Group Limited (CDSG)-Product Manager - Payments
achievement: Planned and executed phased rollout of Citizens Wallet across iOS/Android by coordinating internal teams, resolving scope constraints, and managing launch blockers.
Managed sprint planning and backlog execution across engineering and QA to ensure timely delivery of wallet and loyalty features.
Monitored delivery risks and tracked dependencies across payment and loyalty systems using issue logs to resolve pre-launch blockers.
Led UAT planning and execution for wallet and loyalty features by defining acceptance criteria with business teams and driving go/no-go decisions based on defect tracking.
Managed API onboarding with 50+ partners by driving test alignment, contract timelines, and launch approvals.
Led project closure activities (internal training, Agile retrospectives, and lessons learned register) to update organizational process assets for continuous improvement.
Managed end-to-end delivery of Flymya’s booking engine MVP, including scope planning, sprint execution, and alignment across engineering, QA, and sales teams.
Defined and validated acceptance criteria with stakeholders, led UAT cycles, and made go/no-go recommendations based on test outcomes and defect severity.
Spearheaded integration of KBZ Pay and vendor APIs by coordinating test plans, clarifying API specs, and tracking readiness milestones.
Managed launch communications with product, ops, and sales teams to align release timing, collect stakeholder feedback, and guide post-launch workflows
